chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-4624 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.18995/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 04.08.2021 Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Mukhtiar Ahmed Junejo, Assistant Attorney General. ********** Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents No.3 & 4, which is taken on record. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the Respondent Department during the pendency of the Appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that similar type of cases have already been disposed of with directions to the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner, to which learned counsel for the respondents No.3 And 4 concedes. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order, whereas, till the Appeal is finally decided by the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi; the Respondents/Department shall not take any coercive action against the Petitioner. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
